texto: I do what I love to do at the moment. If I wake up tomorrow and decide I want to dance, that's what I'd do. Or design clothes. I think I'd throw myself into whatever I'm doing now. It's not about abandoning what I was doing before, or giving up. It's about knowing that if I die tomorrow, I lived the way I wanted to.
explicacao: Citação de Ayumi Hamasaki sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I do what I love to do at the moment. If I wake up tomorrow and decide I want to dance, that's wh…” articula tempo, love, myself em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como myself e dance.
